strengths: 20 years of progressive software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with clear advancement to Staff Engineer roles
Demonstrated entrepreneurial leadership as founder of GISCollective, an open-source platform deployed in production with real-world users
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure through MCP code generators and agent-framework work at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products built—the role specifically focuses on AI strategy, yet resume shows no machine learning projects or AI-powered platforms
Lacks cloud platform strategy experience; background is primarily infrastructure/deployment (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK) rather than cloud architecture or product strategy
No Master's or PhD in AI-related field, no thought leadership on AI strategy, and no evidence of enterprise customer advisory work on cutting-edge technologies
response.justification: Szabo is a technically accomplished generalist with 20 years of software engineering and legitimate staff-level credentials, but this role requires specialized expertise in AI strategy that is not evident in the resume. While the current position at re:cinq mentions MCP and AI-agent infrastructure, this is infrastructure tooling rather than demonstrated AI product development or strategic cloud platform work. The job emphasizes 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' and cloud product strategy—neither of which appears in the resume. Recent AI exposure is a positive signal, but too nascent and infrastructure-focused to indicate the deep, demonstrated AI expertise this Director-level principal engineer role requires.
